name: Mixed Nested Layout
summary: VerticalLayout containing a HorizontalLayout to mix row and column arrangements
whenToUse: Forms that need some fields side-by-side and others stacked vertically
Combining first/last name on one row with a multi-line textarea below
notes: Nest a HorizontalLayout inside a VerticalLayout to create mixed arrangements
This is the most common layout pattern for forms with name fields + longer inputs
Layouts can be nested up to several levels deep, but keep it simple for readability
